title: OpenAI Acquires Promptfoo to Safeguard AI Agents - LinkedIn
search_path_label: A 级媒体 / GDELT 路径
full_text:
OpenAI just acquired Promptfoo to safeguard #AI agents in their new Frontier platform.
OpenAI just acquired Promptfoo to safeguard #AI agents in their new Frontier platform.
Here's what nobody's talking about: AI #agent #IP is about to explode.
Every company racing to deploy "AI coworkers" needs two things:
1. Security guardrails (what Promptfoo does)
2. #Patent protection for their agentic workflows (what 99% are ignoring)
The irony? While everyone obsesses over model weights and training data, the real moat is in the orchestration layer — how agents route, delegate, and make decisions.
I've been filing patents on agentic systems for 18 months. The claims aren't on the AI itself. They're on the workflows — the novel methods your agents use to solve problems humans can't.
If you're building AI agents and haven't thought about IP strategy, you're leaving the biggest defensibility lever on the table.
What #agentic workflows are you building that competitors can't easily copy?
https://lnkd.in/gK3CutDA
